## Highlights

- **D31 — Per-role + per-task model tier.** Three vendor-neutral tiers (`reasoning` · `standard` · `fast`) declared as role-kernel `default-tier:`; concrete model IDs live in the adapter map. Defaults: `team-lead` + `solution-architect` → `reasoning`; the other 5 cardinals → `standard`.
- **New per-task prefix `model:<tier>`** in the dispatch line — combinable with `auto:` / `branch:` / `wt:` / `commit:`. Adopter override via `local/framework.config.yaml § model-tier.per-role.<role>`.
- **Claude install writes `model: <id>`** into each `.claude/agents/<role>.md` frontmatter from the resolved tier. Other adapters emit a one-line install warning + document the prefix as a user hint.
- **D30 — Adopt-existing-solution as a first-class Phase-2 option.** Every Phase 2 design proposal AND every iteration-protocol Propose step (Phase 4–7 > 15-min sub-tasks with a live adopt-vs-build axis) MUST surface ≥ 1 `adopt` candidate (name · version · source · license · fit) OR an explicit `(none viable — <reason>)` cite. Self-lint enforcement; no external linter.
- **D29 — Strict subagent-return schema.** Every cardinal-dispatch return follows `core/templates/phase-report.md` — 5 required sections + 2 conditional + optional Notes carve-out. Measured 68.5% byte reduction on a real Phase-4 return.
- **D28 — Skill-runner / team-lead surface boundary.** Skill-runner is mechanical-ops-only; plan drafting · synthesis · gate text · routing reconciliation all dispatch `@team-lead`. Every `ginee-*` skill hands off after its first batch.
- **D27 — `/ginee-update` now reaches a standard install** (fix). Step 1 no longer requires the installer scripts inside `.agents/ginee/` (they're bootstrap-layer); Step 6 fetches `install.{ps1,sh}` from upstream on demand.

## Adopter migration

**None required** — D27–D31 are all purely additive. No `local/*` schema changes; no adapter re-install needed.

**One-time recovery for pre-D27 installs** whose `/ginee-update` was broken — run the bootstrap one-liner once:

```powershell
$env:GINEE_UPDATE_ONLY='1'; $env:GINEE_ADAPTER='claude'; iwr -useb https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/main/install.ps1 | iex
```

```bash
GINEE_UPDATE_ONLY=1 GINEE_ADAPTER=claude bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/main/install.sh)"
```

Subsequent updates flow through `/ginee-update`.

Migrations: [D31](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D31-model-tier.md) · [D30](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D30-adopt-existing-solution.md) · [D29](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D29-strict-subagent-return-schema.md) · [D28](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D28-skill-runner-boundary.md) · [D27](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D27-installer-fetch-on-update.md).

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.11.0...v0.12.0
